en: In the second year of the reign of Nebuchadnezzar, Nebuchadnezzar had dreams; his spirit was troubled, and his sleep left him.
zh: 尼布甲尼撒在位第二年，他作了夢，因此心裡煩亂，不能入睡。

en: Then the king commanded that the magicians, the enchanters, the sorcerers, and the Chaldeans be summoned to tell the king his dreams. So they came in and stood before the king.
zh: 於是王吩咐人把術士、用法術的、行邪術的和迦勒底人都召來，要他們把王的夢告訴王。他們來了，站在王面前。

en: And the king said to them, "I had a dream, and my spirit is troubled to know the dream."
zh: 王對他們說：“我作了一個夢，心裡煩亂，我要知道這是甚麼夢。”

en: Then the Chaldeans said to the king in Aramaic, "O king, live forever! Tell your servants the dream, and we will show the interpretation."
zh: 迦勒底人用亞蘭話對王說：“願王萬歲！請把那夢告訴僕人，我們好解釋夢的意思。”

en: The king answered and said to the Chaldeans, "The word from me is firm: if you do not make known to me the dream and its interpretation, you shall be torn limb from limb, and your houses shall be laid in ruins.
zh: 王回答迦勒底人說：“我已經定旨：如果你們不把那夢和夢的意思向我說明，就必被碎屍萬段，你們的家必成為廢墟。

en: But if you show the dream and its interpretation, you shall receive from me gifts and rewards and great honor. Therefore show me the dream and its interpretation."
zh: 如果你們能把那夢和夢的意思向我解釋，就必從我這裡得禮物、獎賞和大尊榮，所以你們要把夢和夢的意思向我解釋。”

en: They answered a second time and said, "Let the king tell his servants the dream, and we will show its interpretation."
zh: 他們第二次回答王說：“請王把夢告訴僕人，我們好解釋夢的意思。”

en: The king answered and said, "I know with certainty that you are trying to gain time, because you see that the word from me is firm-
zh: 王回答說：“我清楚知道你們企圖拖延時間，因為你們看出我已經定旨。

en: if you do not make the dream known to me, there is but one sentence for you. You have agreed to speak lying and corrupt words before me till the times change. Therefore tell me the dream, and I shall know that you can show me its interpretation."
zh: 如果你們不把那夢向我說明，只有一個辦法對付你們。你們串通在我面前胡言亂語，希望時勢有所改變。你們現在要把夢告訴我，好使我知道你們真能把夢的意思向我解釋。”

en: The Chaldeans answered the king and said, "There is not a man on earth who can meet the king's demand, for no great and powerful king has asked such a thing of any magician or enchanter or Chaldean.
zh: 迦勒底人在王面前回答說：“世上沒有人能把王所問的事說出來，因為從來沒有一個偉大和有權勢的君王向術士、用法術的和迦勒底人詢問過這樣的事。

en: The thing that the king asks is difficult, and no one can show it to the king except the gods, whose dwelling is not with flesh."
zh: 王所問的事很難答，除了那不和世人同住的神明以外，沒有人能在王面前把這事說出來。”

en: Because of this the king was angry and very furious, and commanded that all the wise men of Babylon be destroyed.
zh: 因此，王大發烈怒，下令殺絕巴比倫所有的智慧人。

en: So the decree went out, and the wise men were about to be killed; and they sought Daniel and his companions, to kill them.
zh: 於是王的御旨發出，要把智慧人都殺死；人就尋找但以理和他的同伴，要殺死他們。

en: Then Daniel replied with prudence and discretion to Arioch, the captain of the king's guard, who had gone out to kill the wise men of Babylon.
zh: 那時，王的護衛長亞略出來，要殺死巴比倫的智慧人，但以理就婉轉機敏地向他詢問；

en: He declared to Arioch, the king's captain, "Why is the decree of the king so urgent?" Then Arioch made the matter known to Daniel.
zh: 但以理對王的護衛長亞略說：“王的命令為甚麼這樣嚴厲呢？”亞略就把這事告訴但以理。

en: And Daniel went in and requested the king to appoint him a time, that he might show the interpretation to the king.
zh: 但以理就進去，求王寬限，使他可以把那夢的意思為王解釋。

en: Then Daniel went to his house and made the matter known to Hananiah, Mishael, and Azariah, his companions,
zh: 但以理回到自己的家裡，把這事告訴他的同伴哈拿尼雅、米沙利和亞撒利雅，

en: and told them to seek mercy from the God of heaven concerning this mystery, so that Daniel and his companions might not be destroyed with the rest of the wise men of Babylon.
zh: 要他們為這隱祕的事祈求天上的 神憐憫，免得但以理和他的同伴與巴比倫其餘的智慧人一同滅亡。

en: Then the mystery was revealed to Daniel in a vision of the night. Then Daniel blessed the God of heaven.
zh: 於是這隱祕的事在夜間的異象中給但以理顯明了。但以理就稱頌天上的 神。

en: Daniel answered and said: "Blessed be the name of God forever and ever, to whom belong wisdom and might.
zh: 但以理說： “願 神的名得稱頌，從永遠直到永遠， 因為智慧和能力都是屬他的。

en: He changes times and seasons; he removes kings and sets up kings; he gives wisdom to the wise and knowledge to those who have understanding;
zh: 他改變時間、季節； 他廢王、立王； 他賜智慧給智慧人， 賜知識給聰明人。

en: he reveals deep and hidden things; he knows what is in the darkness, and the light dwells with him.
zh: 他顯明深奧和隱密的事， 他洞悉暗中的一切， 因為光明與他同住。

en: To you, O God of my fathers, I give thanks and praise, for you have given me wisdom and might, and have now made known to me what we asked of you, for you have made known to us the king's matter."
zh: 我列祖的 神啊！我感謝你，讚美你！ 你把智慧和能力賜了給我； 我們向你所求的，現在你已向我顯明， 把王的事告訴了我們。”

en: Therefore Daniel went in to Arioch, whom the king had appointed to destroy the wise men of Babylon. He went and said thus to him, "Do not destroy the wise men of Babylon; bring me in before the king, and I will show the king the interpretation."
zh: 於是但以理進去見亞略，就是王委派去殺絕巴比倫的智慧人的，對他這樣說：“不要殺絕巴比倫的智慧人；請把我帶到王面前，我要把夢的意思向王解釋。”

en: Then Arioch brought in Daniel before the king in haste and said thus to him: "I have found among the exiles from Judah a man who will make known to the king the interpretation."
zh: 亞略就急忙把但以理帶到王面前，對王這樣說：“我在被擄的猶大人中找到一個能把夢的意思向王說明的人。”

en: The king said to Daniel, whose name was Belteshazzar, "Are you able to make known to me the dream that I have seen and its interpretation?"
zh: 王問稱為伯提沙撒的但以理說：“你能向我說明我所見的夢和夢的意思嗎？”

en: Daniel answered the king and said, "No wise men, enchanters, magicians, or astrologers can show to the king the mystery that the king has asked,
zh: 但以理在王面前回答說：“王所問的那隱祕的事，沒有智慧人、用法術的、術士和占星家能向王解釋；

en: but there is a God in heaven who reveals mysteries, and he has made known to King Nebuchadnezzar what will be in the latter days. Your dream and the visions of your head as you lay in bed are these:
zh: 只有一位在天上的 神能把一切隱祕的事顯明；他已經把日後將要發生的事告訴你尼布甲尼撒王了。你的夢和你躺在床上時腦海中出現的異象就是這樣：

en: To you, O king, as you lay in bed came thoughts of what would be after this, and he who reveals mysteries made known to you what is to be.
zh: 王啊！你躺在床上時，想到日後將要發生的事，那顯明隱祕事的 神就把將要發生的事向你說明了。

en: But as for me, this mystery has been revealed to me, not because of any wisdom that I have more than all the living, but in order that the interpretation may be made known to the king, and that you may know the thoughts of your mind.
zh: 現在這隱祕的事向我顯明，並不是因為我的智慧勝過所有的人，而是要使王知道夢的意思和你心想明白的事。

en: "You saw, O king, and behold, a great image. This image, mighty and of exceeding brightness, stood before you, and its appearance was frightening.
zh: “王啊！你正在觀看，看見有一座大像，那像甚高，非常光耀，豎立在你面前，樣貌十分可怕。

en: The head of this image was of fine gold, its chest and arms of silver, its middle and thighs of bronze,
zh: 這像的頭是純金的，胸膛和手臂是銀的，腹和腰是銅的，

en: its legs of iron, its feet partly of iron and partly of clay.
zh: 腿是鐵的，腳是鐵和泥混雜的。

en: As you looked, a stone was cut out by no human hand, and it struck the image on its feet of iron and clay, and broke them in pieces.
zh: 你正觀看的時候，有一塊非人手鑿成的石頭，擊在那座大像鐵和泥混雜的腳上，把腳砸碎了。

en: Then the iron, the clay, the bronze, the silver, and the gold, all together were broken in pieces, and became like the chaff of the summer threshing floors; and the wind carried them away, so that not a trace of them could be found. But the stone that struck the image became a great mountain and filled the whole earth.
zh: 於是鐵、泥、銅、銀、金都一同砸得粉碎，好像夏天禾場上的糠秕，被風吹散，無處可尋；那打碎這像的石頭卻變成一座大山，充滿全地。

en: "This was the dream. Now we will tell the king its interpretation.
zh: “這就是那夢，現在我們要在王面前講解那夢的意思。

en: You, O king, the king of kings, to whom the God of heaven has given the kingdom, the power, and the might, and the glory,
zh: 王啊！你是萬王之王，天上的 神已經把國度、權柄、能力和尊榮都賜給你；

en: and into whose hand he has given, wherever they dwell, the children of man, the beasts of the field, and the birds of the heavens, making you rule over them all- you are the head of gold.
zh: 也把散居在各處的世人、田野的走獸和空中的飛鳥，都交在你手裡，使你管理這一切。你就是那金頭。

en: Another kingdom inferior to you shall arise after you, and yet a third kingdom of bronze, which shall rule over all the earth.
zh: 在你以後，另一國將興起，不及於你。後有第三國，就是那銅的，要統治全地。

en: And there shall be a fourth kingdom, strong as iron, because iron breaks to pieces and shatters all things. And like iron that crushes, it shall break and crush all these.
zh: 還有第四國，堅強如鐵，因為鐵能砸碎擊破萬物；鐵怎樣壓碎一切，那國也要照樣砸碎一切。

en: And as you saw the feet and toes, partly of potter's clay and partly of iron, it shall be a divided kingdom, but some of the firmness of iron shall be in it, just as you saw iron mixed with the soft clay.
zh: 正如你看見那像的腳和腳趾是窯匠的泥和鐵混雜的，那國也必分裂；正如你看見鐵和陶泥混合在一起，那國也必有鐵的堅硬。

en: And as the toes of the feet were partly iron and partly clay, so the kingdom shall be partly strong and partly brittle.
zh: 那些腳趾是鐵和泥混雜的，那國也必是部分堅強，部分脆弱。

en: As you saw the iron mixed with soft clay, so they will mix with one another in marriage, but they will not hold together, just as iron does not mix with clay.
zh: 你怎樣看見鐵和陶泥混合在一起，那國的人也必和列國的人通婚混雜，卻不能彼此聯合，正如鐵和泥不能混雜一樣。

en: And in the days of those kings the God of heaven will set up a kingdom that shall never be destroyed, nor shall the kingdom be left to another people. It shall break in pieces all these kingdoms and bring them to an end, and it shall stand forever,
zh: 那些王在位的時候，天上的 神必興起另一個永不滅亡的國，國權必不歸給別族的人。這國必砸碎毀滅其他各國；並且這國必存到永遠。

en: just as you saw that a stone was cut from a mountain by no human hand, and that it broke in pieces the iron, the bronze, the clay, the silver, and the gold. A great God has made known to the king what shall be after this. The dream is certain, and its interpretation sure."
zh: 正如你看見那塊從山而出，非人手鑿成的石頭，把鐵、銅、泥、銀和金都砸碎了，偉大的 神已把日後必有的結局都告訴王了。這夢是確實的，夢的意思也是準確的。”

en: Then King Nebuchadnezzar fell upon his face and paid homage to Daniel, and commanded that an offering and incense be offered up to him.
zh: 尼布甲尼撒王俯伏在地，向但以理下拜，又下令向但以理獻上供物和香品。

en: The king answered and said to Daniel, "Truly, your God is God of gods and Lord of kings, and a revealer of mysteries, for you have been able to reveal this mystery."
zh: 王對但以理說：“你們的 神真是萬神之神，萬王之王，又是顯明隱祕事的，因為你能把這隱祕的事顯明出來。”

en: Then the king gave Daniel high honors and many great gifts, and made him ruler over the whole province of Babylon and chief prefect over all the wise men of Babylon.
zh: 於是王提升但以理，賜他許多貴重的禮物，使他管理巴比倫全省，又立他為總長，管理巴比倫所有的智慧人。

en: Daniel made a request of the king, and he appointed Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego over the affairs of the province of Babylon. But Daniel remained at the king's court.
zh: 但以理求王，王就委派沙得拉、米煞、亞伯尼歌管理巴比倫省的政務；但以理卻在朝中侍立。
